title: Ashen + Gliders Compatibility
description: Ashen Resourcepack addon — adds compatibility with the Gliders mod.
body:
This addon provides modified item and model textures to ensure compatibility with the Azure Paxels mod while preserving the Ashen resourcepack style. It also slightly alters the appearance of all gliders.

---

If you encounter any issues, please contact me (sof_izh) on the [Ashen Discord server](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh). Do not report these issues to Aim_Boot, as this is just a fan-made addon and is not officially affiliated with the main Ashen resourcepack.

---

Credits:
- Aim_Boot – [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack
- Jarin, tamlighter – [Gliders](https://modrinth.com/mod/gliders) mod
